title: Cozy Living Room with Jewel Tone Decor and Textured Fabrics
description: Inviting living room featuring a green velvet sofa with blue and beige pillows, layered textured fabrics including woven rugs and linen curtains in sapphire and beige hues. The space is decorated with handmade ceramics, vintage books, and warm ambient lighting from a floor lamp and candle, creating a cozy and personalized atmosphere.
